action.reasoning: Observation: Larger STGCN (hidden_channels=128, spatial_channels=64, num_blocks=4, dropout=0.15, weight_decay=1e-4) trained for 40 epochs, best val MAE (normalized) 0.326130, down from 0.3367 (iter 6) and 0.4133 (tiny). Training took 615s (~10 min). Loss steadily decreasing; model is learning. Analysis: This model should improve mae_60min from previous 4.2094. We need to evaluate to confirm and guide next steps (longer training, architecture tweaks). Remaining time ~2.73h, 21 iterations left, ample budget for further optimization. Decision: Submit eval with best.pt from iter 9 training to get updated mae_60min baseline. Then, depending on result, consider scaling training duration, trying larger model with more blocks, learning rate warmup/cosine annealing, or attention mechanisms.
